description_long: This chair features a dramatic, sculptural design with a high, spiked backrest composed of vertically arranged, irregular wooden slats that fan outwards. The seat is broad and slightly curved, made from the same wood material, with visible natural grain patterns. The legs are thick and sturdy, positioned at the front corners, while the back is supported by the continuation of the slats, which also serve as the backrest. The armrests are implied by the lower, outward-angled slats on either side of the seat, providing a sense of enclosure and support. The overall appearance is rustic yet modern, reminiscent of a throne or statement piece, likely to draw attention in any urban park or plaza. The wood finish is matte, with a natural, slightly rough texture that emphasizes the organic feel of the design.
description: A striking wooden chair with a high, spiked backrest and broad, curved seat, featuring natural wood grain and a sculptural, throne-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, high spiked backrest, and outward-angled slats forming armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dramatic height of the backrest and the curvature of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the tall, vertical slats and the solid, enclosed back structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the angled slats and seat profile.
